args:
echo "DF04_NONPROD_APP_START"
test -d app/backend
echo "CONNECTED_REPO_ROOT=$(pwd)"
echo "BACKEND_PATH_EXISTS=true"
echo "BACKEND_FILE_LIST_BEGIN"
find app/backend -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | sed -n '1,200p'
echo "BACKEND_FILE_LIST_END"

gcloud run deploy "${_SERVICE_NAME}" \
  --project="${_PLATFORM_PROJECT}" \
  --region="${_REGION}" \
  --source="app/backend" \
  --service-account="${_DEPLOY_SA_EMAIL}" \
  --allow-unauthenticated \
  --quiet \
  --update-secrets="PETCARE_RUNTIME_CONFIG=${_RUNTIME_SECRET_NAME}:latest" \
  --labels="env=nonprod,phase=df04,managed-by=cloud-build"

gcloud run services describe "${_SERVICE_NAME}" \
  --project="${_PLATFORM_PROJECT}" \
  --region="${_REGION}" \
  --format="value(metadata.name,status.url)"

echo "DF04_NONPROD_APP_PASS"
steps.name: gcr.io/google.com/cloudsdktool/cloud-sdk:slim

description: PetCare DF04 real nonprod backend application build and deployment contract
name: petcare-nonprod-main
